Thanks for the assist, mortal.
You actually did something worthwhile. Cheers.
Your effort doesn't go unnoticed (for now).
Don't get cocky—I appreciate it.
...and here I thought you were useless. Well done.
Grim world or not, thanks.
Your help slashed through the gloom.
No more complaints, I accept your thanks.
You survive another day, thanks to you.
I'll remember this favor—don't push it.
The darkness bows to our alliance. Thanks.
Your cruelty... I mean kindness, is noted.
Thanks for fueling my chaos.
You keep the shadows alive. Gratitude.
Even monsters need backup—thanks.
I'll spare you a thanks this time.
Your prowess is... acceptable.
Thanks for jumping into the abyss with me.
You've proven less of a liability. Cheers.
I'll write this one in my grim diary.
Thanks for adding that spark to the void.
Your twisted sense of kindness... thank you.
I'll carve your name in darkness. Thanks.
You didn't crash and burn—bravo.
Your gesture cuts deeper than any blade.
Thanks for being the lesser evil.
You faced the abyss—and helped me. Cheers.
I'll raise my skull cup to you.
No redemption, but thanks anyway.
You've earned a spot in my nightmares—thanks.
Thanks for not dying on me.
The void thanks you for your help.
You and I—both monsters. Thanks, I guess.
Thanks for the unholy alliance.
You've proven useful... for now.
Praise the darkness—and you. Thanks.
You might survive another night. Cheers.
Your defiance is appreciated.
Thanks for embracing the darkness by my side.
